title: Snappy
description:
The best performing modpack
And Quality of Life features
body:
### The Snappy modpack is now available on both Neoforge and Fabric platforms. While there are some differences between the two versions, each is considered the fastest modpack in its respective category.
### 
It's important to note that the Neoforge version supports shaders but is a bit slower than the Fabric version, which is Vulkan-based. They both offer all the features of Sodium delivering significantly better performance on supported systems—especially at higher render distances.

### **Key features include:** ### 
- Works out of the box, no configuration needed—**"It just works."**
- Zoom function
- **Improved** ping display
- **Smoother** animations
- **Enhanced** hunger bar
- Inventory and crafting tweaks
- **Improved** F3 panel
- **Instant quit** from worlds
- Better sound
- Searchable keybinds menu

It provides a **50%** performance boost compared to other Sodium-based modpacks and up to **6x** the performance of Optifine.

<details>
<summary>"Some meaningless thing"</summary>

The performance claims were only made for the vulkan based version

</details>
